title: The Copper Rail
description: Copper rail is a directional rail. It would push any minecart over it, without the need of a block on one side to start the movement.
body:
### This mod adds the copper rail, which **pushes minecarts only in 1 direction**!

- It **does not need a block** nearby to start pushing, like vanilla powered rails.
- Copper rails have to **be powered** to work. They would act as unpowered golden rails otherwise.
- Just like activator rails don't power golden rails, copper rails also **don't share redstone power with other rail types**.
- Pushing direction is determined by position of the player who placed the rail.
- As a bonus, these rails also generate in mineshaft loot chests, just like all vanilla rails.
- [Now has an unofficial Barebones resource pack compat!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-copper-rail)

![Example use of copper rails to redirect a minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P8zXItsV/images/99e10163f7c767d16d5ba789c64c05a65afe832f.gif)

*This mod has been inspired by [u/schevve_](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/17q1tzm/another_possible_feature_using_copper).*
